channel.title: Coffee Enthusiast
channel.description: Honest coffee reviews and brewing tips

item.title: How to Store Coffee Beans: Freezer vs Counter
item.description: Does storing coffee in the freezer really keep it fresh? Or should you leave it on the counter?

item.title: Hard Water vs Soft Water: Does It Affect Your Coffee?
item.description: You've probably heard coffee snobs talk about water like it's the most important ingredient.

item.title: Arabica vs Robusta: What's the Difference?
item.description: Single-origin is having a moment. Coffee shops act like it's the only respectable choice.

item.title: Why Your Coffee Tastes Bitter (And How to Fix It)
item.description: Bitter coffee is the universal coffee complaint. But here's the thing — some bitterness is actually good.

item.title: Perfect Water Temperature for Coffee: Myth vs Fact
item.description: Water temperature can make or break your coffee. Get it wrong, and you'll be drinking regret.

item.title: Single-Origin vs Blend: Which Coffee Should You Buy?
item.description: Single-origin is having a moment. Coffee shops act like it's the only respectable choice.

item.title: How to Clean Your Coffee Machine (Without Chemicals)
item.description: Daily cleaning keeps your coffee tasting fresh. Here's how to do it right without harsh chemicals.

item.title: Why I Regret Buying the De'Longhi ECAM 22.110 After 3 Months
item.description: Spoiler: I don't actually regret it. But there are things I wish I knew before dropping $350 on this machine.

item.title: De'Longhi vs Breville vs Nespresso: Which Is Worth It?
item.description: I spent way too much time researching coffee machines. Here's what I learned so you don't have to.

item.title: Coffee Machine Buying Guide for Beginners (2024)
item.description: I bought three different coffee machines so you don't have to. Here's everything I learned.
